title: Manage retained history and recovery
preconditions: Tally is running inside the sole-owner local trust boundary and the requested operation uses compatible versions, bounded input, and safe owner-only paths where a target is required. Delete, Backup, and Restore requests include actor attribution and idempotency identity; Delete also names its reason and exact report target. Verify and Status are read-only within the invoking owner host account.
postconditions: Successful maintenance has one attributable complete outcome. Failure leaves the previously authoritative store and surviving report history unchanged. Existing backups remain point-in-time artifacts and may explicitly restore content deleted after they were created.
main_flow: 1. INSIGHTS previews the target retained identity and any surviving Restatement dependency. 2. Explicit deletion of a leaf validates actor, reason, idempotency identity, and permissions, atomically removes its report payload and link, and appends one metadata-only Deletion Event. 3. A referenced report is RESTRICTed until descendants are deleted from leaves to root; there is no automatic expiry or cleanup. 4. Backup captures all current durable INSIGHTS state with a manifest, fingerprint, version, permissions, and integrity evidence. 5. Verification independently checks completeness and integrity. 6. Restore builds and verifies a separate candidate, then atomically activates the exact selected backup state only after all checks pass. 7. Status returns metadata-only version, integrity, retained/deleted counts, and recovery evidence.
alt_flows: Deletion without actor, reason, idempotency identity, or explicit target is rejected.
Deletion of a Report Snapshot with a surviving Restatement dependency returns conflict and removes nothing.
Unsafe path, symlink traversal, wrong ownership or permissions, incompatible version, corruption, omission, insufficient space, or failed integrity check blocks backup or restore activation.
Cancellation or crash before activation leaves the prior store authoritative.
Status and failures never emit report contents, amounts, merchant text, or private paths.
metadata: {"depth_tier":3,"primary_actor":"P1","trigger":"The owner explicitly requests report deletion, backup, verification, restore, or storage-status evidence.","status":"draft"}
